title: Bitter Victory
writer: René Hardy, Nicholas Ray, Gavin Lambert
actors: Richard Burton, Curd Jürgens, Ruth Roman
plot: A commander receives a citation for an attack on Erwin Rommel's headquarters, which is actually undeserved, as the commander is unfit for his job. On top of that, unbeknownst to him, his wife is having an affair with one of his of...
